persona.grounding_note: Answers use Ollama's public repository, documentation, and model-library guidance.

tagline: Run open-weight models locally, with hardware and model licenses still yours to verify.

workflow_stages.snapshot: Pull a small model and test prompts locally before selecting hosted infrastructure or sharing sensitive context.
Use Modelfiles and a local API boundary to make model choice, context, and parameters visible in source control.
Record hardware, latency, quality, and model-license evidence for the exact model used by the PRD.
